name: RPlog_The_Gyndine_Debriefing
title: The Gyndine Debriefing
summary: Aboard the Star Destroyer Inquisitor, Commander Valerius convenes a personal debriefing with the intelligence Lieutenant Rainier and the flight officer Jonas Alsten after a patrol returns with battle damage. Jonas recounts how his squadron, conducting hyperdrive trials near Gyndine, was unexpectedly engaged by a full squadron of Rebel X-wings that were eventually chased off without Imperial casualties. The three officers debate the Rebels' intentions, weighing whether the incursion is tied to the Corellian resistance, a probe of Imperial defenses, or a feint masking some other objective. Concluding that their current forces cannot adequately cover both Gyndine and Corellia, Valerius decides to split the task force: keeping the Inquisitor at Corellia, sending the Nemesis and two frigates to Gyndine, and positioning the rest between them for rapid response. Rainier moves to brief Naval Intelligence on likely Rebel scenarios while Valerius commends Jonas and pledges to note his performance in his file.
